TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Mayl'ux Itiniay i Wufeng Cen no Hsinchu ko Mayl'ux a niyaro', 62 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 143 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 89% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 127 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 11% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 16 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal 72%, Saysiyat 12%, Amis 3%, Bunun 1%, Truku 1%. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'.
S.PHON: majɾʡo~u~ux itiniaj i wo~u~ufəŋ ʦən no~u ħsinʦħo~u~u ko~u majɾʡo~u~ux a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ **%, sajsijat **%, amis *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, tro~u~uko~u~u *%. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Mayl'ux Itiniay i Wufeng Cen no Hsinchu ko Mayl'ux a niyaro', 62 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 143 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 89% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 127 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 11% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 16 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal 72%, Saysiyat 12%, Amis 3%, Bunun 1%, Truku 1%. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'.
S.PHON: majɾʡo~u~ux itiniaj i wo~u~ufəŋ ʦən no~u ħsinʦħo~u~u ko~u majɾʡo~u~ux a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ **%, sajsijat **%, amis *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, tro~u~uko~u~u *%. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ.
